output:
The output contains at least 3 Paris tourist attraction names with descriptions and source URLs from web_search results:

1. Eiffel Tower:
   - Name: Eiffel Tower
   - Description: The Eiffel Tower (/ ˈaɪfəl / ⓘ EYE-fəl; French: Tour Eiffel [tuʁ ɛfɛl] ⓘ) is a lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It is named after the engineer Gustave Eiffel, whose company designed and built the tower from 1887 to 1889.
   - URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eiffel_Tower
2. Louvre Museum:
   - Name: Louvre Museum
   - Description: The Louvre, [a] or the Louvre Museum (French: Musée du Louvre [myze dy luvʁ] ⓘ), is a national art museum in Paris, France. The Louvre, a former royal palace, is known for its collection of celebrated paintings collected by the French kings, including the Mona Lisa of Leonardo Da Vinci.
   - URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Louvre_Museum
